title: 2Pcs M10 Carabiner Hook, Large Stainless Steel Carabiner Clip Heavy Duty Spring Snap Clip Keychain Locking Snap Hook for Outdoor,Camping, Hiking, Traveling, Fishing
features: Material: Carabiner clip hooks are made of 304 stainless steel material,processed by zinc plated,which are anti-rust, durable and sturdy for long time using
Size: Carabiner snap hook size is 100mm x 46mm,material thickness is 9mm approx,carabiner can hold load up to 200kg,compact design makes it handy and easy to carry
Design: Carabiner keychain clips features with spring loaded and self closing which allow quick connect/dis-connect of ropes,straps, and others you want to clip on
Wide use: Stainless steel carabiner hooks suitable for camping,hiking,fishing,use it for sleeping bag,water bottle,walking pole,key chain,and other equipments
Package Include: Come with 2PCS 10mm heavy duty carabina snap hook clips,Opens and closes smoothly as the spring, it easy to attach important items to it
description: Product Description M10 Carabiner Clip Heavy Duty Large Hiking Clips Stainless Steel Carabiner Hook Carabiner Snap Hook Spring Snap Clip About Us Zngou always puts integrity in the first place, and constantly provides high-quality products and services to all customers. Committed to quality and attention to details, every process has been carefully processed and strictly screened. All Zngou employees always strive to create an elegant, comfortable and convenient lifestyle! M10 Heavy Duty Carabiner Clip Stainless Steel Carabiner Snap Hooks are Great for Ropes, Chains, Straps, Backpacks, Key Ring, Camping, Hiking, Walking, Travel, Fishing, Hunting, Marine, Boats, Home, Dog Leash, Indoor, Outdoor, Equipment, Gear, Tools, Gates, Gym, Hammocks, Water Bottles, etc. Specifications: Material: Stainless Steel Size: 80mm x 39mm Load Baring: 220 - 440lb Color: Silver Brushed surface treatment, feel comfortable, do not hurt hands. Strong and durable. Latch spring hook doors open and close for easy, smooth, and quick connections. Good corrosion resistance and works well in wet indoor and outdoor environments.
